chapters.title: Searching Online
chapters.content: Carla wanted to move closer to her office, so she spent hours looking at apartment ads online and comparing prices.

chapters.title: The First Visit
chapters.content: The first apartment looked beautiful in the photos, but in real life it was smaller and darker than she expected.

chapters.title: The Right Choice
chapters.content: The third apartment had sunlight, a small balcony, and a quiet street nearby. Carla knew immediately it was the right place.
